items.description:
Toy Flintlock 1807 Russian Musket. 

In 1807, The empire decided to copy Britain and begin producing Tula pattern muskets for their lighter infantry. These were given out to "chosen men" within regiments. Little is known about the Tula as few were officially made, and the few that were made were either lost or buried over the years.

DISCLAIM: NOT A REAL/EXACT REPLICA; NOT A RIFLE.

items.name: 巫女の髪型　- Hairstyle of a miko (shrine maiden) - No.2
items.description:
巫女装束とは古くから日本で使われている伝統的な装束で、このアイテムは巫女の伝統的な髪型です。
巫女装束は漫画やアニメなどといった創作物のモデルとされることがとてもよくありますね！
私たちのストアに巫女装束のアイテムも販売しています。そちらもぜひ見てください！

The miko costume is a traditional costume used in Japan since ancient times, and this item is the traditional hairstyle of a miko.
Very often, the miko costume is used as a model for creative works such as manga and anime!
We also sell miko hairstyle items in our store. Please have a look there too!

Sleek leather-like textures add a modern touch, making it perfect for avatars who want to stand out with quiet confidence.
💡 Why You’ll Love It

✨ PBR textures that give the fabric a realistic sheen

🎮 Versatile style — cool, mysterious, but never harsh
🔍 Keywords: black coat, long trench coat, cinematic outfit, stylish fashion, mysterious robe, Roblox
